question: What did the mayor of Tilamuk, Indonesia announce on Tuesday?
expected_behavior: Likely no English-language source — should admit not found cleanly.

context_precision.reasoning: No chunk mentions Tilamuk, Indonesia, or any mayor's announcement on Tuesday.

answer_relevancy.error: Cannot copy out of meta tensor; no data! Please use torch.nn.Module.to_empty() instead of torch.nn.Module.to() when movi

pipeline.answer:
**No announcement of a Tilamuk Indonesia mayor announcement on either date has been found in the provided sources.**

The sources cover a range of events on **Tuesday, 5 May 2026** — including an Indonesia vs. China U17 football match [2], a magnitude 3.3 earthquake south of Java, Indonesia [4], and a Montreal news digest [1] — but none mention a mayoral announcement in Tilamuk.

For **Tuesday, 12 May 2026**, the only source is a FOX Weather TV listing, which has no connection to Indonesian municipal politics [5].

There is also no reference linking the dates "2026-05-05" or "2026-05-12" to any mayoral announcement in Tilamuk, Indonesia, in any of the five provided sources [1][2][3][4][5].

urls.title: Announcement_01/05/2026
urls.snippet:
Title: Announcement_01/05/2026
Osypa Logo and when click will take you to the home page. Call Us Now FREE: 80005588​​. # Announcement\_01/05/2026. We would like to remind you that on 01/05/2026 is a public holiday. On public holidays, buses operate according to the Sunday schedule. Buses that do not run on Sundays, do not operate on public holidays. Only the two airport lines 612 and 613 operate year-round without any changes. ## Recent Posts. Easter Announcement 12-14/04/2026. We would like to inform you that on Sunday / Monday and Tuesday of Easter (12-14/04/2026) the Sunday/Holiday schedule will be applied on the routes, for the remaining days the regular schedule will be. Important Announcement - 27/03/2026. Click to go to top of page.

chunks.title: https://www.volcanodiscovery.com/earthquakes/quake-info/22973220/mag3quake-May-5-2026-South-of-Java-Indonesia.html
chunks.chunk_text:
A light magnitude 3.3 earthquake occurred in the Indian Ocean 266 km (165 mi) from Indonesia in the afternoon of Tuesday, May 5, 2026 at 5.36 pm local time (GMT +7). The quake had a very shallow depth of 26 km (16 mi) and was not felt (or at least not reported so).
Date & time | May 5, 2026 10:36:41 UTC - |
Local time at epicenter | Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 05:36 pm (GMT +7) |
Status | confirmed (manually revised) |
Magnitude | 3.3 |
Depth | 26 km |
Epicenter latitude / longitude | 10.57°S / 110.38°E Indonesia |
Seismic antipode | 10.57°N / 69.62°W Venezuela |
Shaking intensity | II Very weak shaking |
Felt | 0 reports |
Primary data source | BMKG (Meteorological, Climatological, and Geophysical Agency of Indonesia) |
Weather at epicenter at time of quake | Broken Clouds 28.3°C (83 F), humidity: 76%, wind: 9 m/s (17 kts) from ESE |
Estimated seismic energy released | 5.6 x 109 joules (1.56 megawatt hours, equivalent to 1.34 tons of TNT) | equivalent to ONE quake of magnitude 3.3 | about seismic energy |
Distance | Place | Max.
